geographic_restrictions: Projects must be conducted in Latin America and the Caribbean, including Mexico, Central America, South America, and the Caribbean.
project_area: shorebird conservation and research in the Neotropics
demographic_requirements: Preference given to early-career professionals with five or fewer years of experience. Applicants must be nationals or residents of Neotropical countries.
eligibility_summary: Open to individuals (early-career professionals preferred) who are nationals or residents of Neotropical countries (Mexico, Central America, South America, Caribbean). Projects must focus on shorebird conservation or research in the region, demonstrate practical conservation outcomes, and include measurable results. Strong emphasis on local collaboration and stakeholder engagement.
